name: Randon One Block
author: PsyCrow1976
tagline: Experimental AI-built NeoForge skyblock — random center block, FTB Quests, Uncrafting Table
pitch: 100% AI-assisted modpack experiment on Minecraft 26.1.2. The author does not hand-write mods or KubeJS — Grok Composer 2.5 fast implements features from descriptions. Core loop: mine one skyblock center block, get a random modpack block back (KubeJS, inspired by Chaos OneBlock). Quest book and pack wiring are AI-assisted too. The Uncrafting Table mod reverses crafting for 26.1.2 where no similar mod existed. No fixed endgame — a sandbox to see how far AI can go on the latest Minecraft.

inspiration.name: Chaos OneBlock
inspiration.credit: Random one-block re-roll concept — shout-out to the Chaos OneBlock creator

custom_mods.name: The Uncrafting Table
custom_mods.purpose: Reverse standard crafting recipes on Minecraft 26.1.2 (AI-assisted; no existing mod for this version)
